name: Sauted Salmon Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, melt the butter.
2. Add the soy sauce and garlic powder to the melted butter.
3. Add the salmon steaks to the skillet.
4. Cook for 4-5 minutes on one side until the fish begins to flake easily.
5. Turn the salmon steaks and cook for an additional 4-5 minutes on the other side.
6. Garnish with lemon slices before serving.
